## Problem
<!-- What user-visible problem does this solve? What's the friction today? -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- A concrete sketch — APIs, CLI flags, UI changes, prompt edits. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Other approaches and why you rejected them. -->

## Out of scope
<!-- What you explicitly don't want this to drift into. -->

## Additional context
<!-- Links, screenshots, prior art, references to upstream docs. -->
